popularStory.headline: Memorial
popularStory.description: Richard was the eldest son of Robert II Archbishop of Rouen and Count of Évreux and Herleva.[1] Richard donated a mill at Evreux to the abbey of Jumièges by charter dated [26 Mar 1038/14 Apr 1039]. He …

zh.Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy,: 法國豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧馬雷
zh.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Évreux是Robert de Normandie和Herleva of Falaise的兒子，於0990年出生在法國諾門迪艾艾福。他和Havoïse d'Eschauffour至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1067年12月13日在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.Roumare, Seine-Maritime, Upper Normandy,: 法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利盧馬雷
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Évreux是Robert de Normandie和Herleva of Falaise的儿子，于0990年出生在法国諾門迪艾艾福。他和Havoïse d'Eschauffour至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1067年12月13日在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Évreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Évreux was born in 0990, in Évreux, Eure, Normandy, France as the son of Robert de Normandie and Herleva of Falaise. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Havoïse d'Eschauffour. He died on 13 December 1067, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Évreux est né en 0990, à Évreux, Eure, Normandie, France, fils de Robert de Normandie et Herleva of Falaise. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Havoïse d'Eschauffour. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1067, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Évreux wurde 0990 in Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Robert de Normandie und Herleva of Falaise geboren. Er hatte mit Havoïse d'Eschauffour mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1067 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Évreux è nato il nel 0990 nel Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Francia come figlio di Robert de Normandie e Herleva of Falaise. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Havoïse d'Eschauffour. Morì il 13 dicembre 1067, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich: フランスノーマンディエウアevレウックス
ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Évreuxは0990年にフランスノーマンディエウアevレウックスでRobert de NormandieとHerleva of Falaiseの息子として生まれた。彼はHavoïse d'Eschauffourとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1067年12月13日に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Évreux(은)는 0990년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 Robert de Normandie(와)과 Herleva of Falaise의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Havoïse d'Eschauffour(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1067년 12월 13일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Évreux nasceu em 0990, em Évreux, Eure, Normandie, França filho de Robert de Normandie e Herleva of Falaise. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Havoïse d'Eschauffour. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1067, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Évreux родился в 0990 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали Robert de Normandie и Herleva of Falaise. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Havoïse d'Eschauffour. Он умер 13 декабря 1067 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Évreux nació en 0990, en Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Francia como hijo de Robert de Normandie y Herleva of Falaise. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Havoïse d'Eschauffour. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1067, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
